situational_context: Running comeback week 4: 5 runs completed (Run #1-#5), consolidating at 5 km. Run #6 overdue — 7-day gap since Run #5 (May 23) due to heat wave + congés. ACWR dropped to 0.71 (below 0.80 lower bound); chronic load declined from 22.3 to 17.2 over 16 days — detraining trajectory. Readiness HIGH (86), HRV BALANCED (weekly avg 36), RHR stable at 49 bpm. Weight steady decline to 103.8 kg (-1 kg/month). Weekend training block planned: cycling Sat (32°C, canicule) + Run #6 Sun (23°C, post-heatwave). Sur site Thu-Fri June 4-5 with e-bike commute load. Primary modality remains e-bike commuting on office days. Baby (Léonie, ~5 months) — occasional fragmented nights, not currently limiting recovery.

recommendations.text: Execute both weekend sessions to arrest 16-day detraining trajectory. ACWR at 0.71 — below 0.80 floor. Prioritise Sunday Run #6: the 7-day gap since Run #5 risks losing tissue-tolerance gains. Cycling Saturday builds aerobic volume; run Sunday is the comeback priority.
recommendations.measurable: Run #6 completed Sun May 31 at 5 km, no post-run pain >24h. ACWR recovers toward 0.8 by June 2.

recommendations.text: Run #7 on Wednesday June 3 restores 2×/week running frequency. 72h gap from Sunday is conservative and tissue-safe. Hold distance at 5 km — do not increase until 3 consecutive pain-free runs at this distance.
recommendations.measurable: Run #7 completed June 3 at 5 km, running frequency 2×/week restored.

recommendations.text: Protein intake averaging ~115g/day vs 150g target. At 104 kg during running comeback with body recomposition, protein adequacy is critical for tendon adaptation and muscle preservation. Target ≥130g/day minimum.
recommendations.measurable: Protein logged ≥130g/day on ≥5 of next 7 days.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Currently 0.71 — below 0.80 floor. Target 0.8-1.0 within 5 days.
markers_to_watch.reason: 16-day detraining trend needs active reversal through planned sessions.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Currently 17.2, declining. Target stabilisation and gradual climb.
markers_to_watch.reason: Detraining status confirmed — running comeback requires chronic load to build, not erode.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized joint/tendon pain lasting >24h after Run #6 triggers skip of Run #7.
markers_to_watch.reason: 7-day gap since last run — tissue re-sensitisation possible on resumption at 104 kg.
